---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in K:BOT or kernel.chat
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Run `kbot ...`
2. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots.

## Environment

- **kbot version**: (run `kbot --version`)
- **Node.js version**: (run `node --version`)
- **OS**: (e.g., macOS 15.3, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11)
- **Provider**: (e.g., Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama, Embedded)
- **Model**: (e.g., claude-sonnet-4-20250514, gpt-4o, llama3.2)

## Additional Context

Any other context, logs, or screenshots.
